id: specific id for each text, (could be int or string)
text: the content of human and AI-generated text. (string size of 150-400 words)
label: value 0 or 1 (0 means human generated and 1 means AI generated)
source: where these text come from(news, Wikipedia. NYU essays)
model: for AI-generated text which model is used to create this text
prompt: If it was AI-generated text, what prompt is used to generated this text
set: Is it train set/ development set/test set
